commands_run: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_native_idea_valuation_audit_ledger.py tests/test_native_auth_parity_form.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check focused native mutation tests and harnesses
python3 scripts/validate_spec_quality.py --file changed native mutation specs
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q relevant native mutation/form spec tests
failure_reason: Promoted bounded public no-header mutable ideas/spec routes to kernel-router native default. Traefik now routes POST/PATCH /api/ideas and POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/spec-registry to kernel-router at priority 900 while preview/public-gate headers remain higher priority and X-Form-Python-Fallback remains explicit fanout. Local public-gate and A/B harnesses both passed 5/5 with confidence 1.0, native persistence readback, revision collision proof, and fallback fanout; public verification is wired for post-deploy.
